allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'refactor\(analytics\): update Forecasting, Spending, and Income drill-downs \(Phase 05 Batch 3\)' --body ' *)
permissions.description: All significant operations require human validation. No auto-approval of terminal commands.

name: Project AETHER — Gajian Aman Redesign
description: Claude Code governance and session configuration for Project AETHER Phase execution
purpose: Enforce strict governance, context limits, and quality gates for AETHER development

sessionBoundaries.batchCompletion: After 3-5 files are modified or when a batch is complete, stop and create a recap.
sessionBoundaries.contextFlushing: End session completely after git commit and recap generation. Start fresh for next batch.

beforeAnyCodeModification: Read the active phase execution document (e.g., phase-01-foundation.md)
Read the runtime phase file (e.g., runtime-phase-01.md)
Read latest recap from aether/session-recaps/ if one exists

buildQualityGates.noCommitWithoutGreenBuild: Absolutely no commits without a passing build. This is non-negotiable.

phase01Forbidden: No modifications to src/app/components/ (except governance-only files)

gitWorkflow.noDirectMainCommits: All feature work must happen on feature/ or develop branches. NEVER commit directly to main.

recapRequirements.timing: Generated at the end of every session, before termination
recapRequirements.requirement: A recap file MUST be written using the runtime template. No session completion without a recap.

antiContextBloatingRules.rereadProhibition: Do not repeatedly read entire project directories. Target specific files identified in Phase Execution plan.
antiContextBloatingRules.memoryPurge: End sessions completely after a git commit and recap generation. Start fresh for the next batch.
antiContextBloatingRules.batchLimitExplanation: Modifying 3-5 files per session is the hard limit to prevent context overflow and maintain clarity.

figmaIntegration.inspectionProtocol: Load runtime-figma-inspection.md and execute Figma MCP extraction per protocol rules
figmaIntegration.tokenExtraction: Do not guess paddings, colors, or spacing. Extract them deterministically from Figma.

validationProtocol.afterComponentCompletion: Run npm run build and npm run lint (once lint is available in Batch 2)
validationProtocol.beforeCommit: All tests and build must pass. No exceptions.
validationProtocol.mobileQA: All UI changes validated against 375px viewport
validationProtocol.accessibilityQA: Ensure ARIA labels, focus traps, and WCAG AAA contrast are maintained

roleAndResponsibility.claudeCodeRole: Execute Phase Execution plan deterministically. Stop at batch completion. Await human validation before proceeding.
roleAndResponsibility.humanRole: Provide pre-flight approval, validate batches, approve transitions between phases.
stopConditions: When context limits approach (3-5 files modified)
When an architectural inconsistency is discovered

notes: This configuration enforces the AETHER Governance Rules. It is the foundation for all subsequent phases. Do not modify without explicit permission from the project owner.
